Book 2 — printed & available now

Stories that build calm, confident, intelligent thinkers.

A calm illustrated universe where Little Fox learns to feel, think, and choose. No villains. No winners. No lectures.

The Wild Challenge Join the Club Take a sneak peek
Printed in London FSC certified

Hi, I’m Little Fox.

Nice to meet you. I don’t always get things right — but I think that’s the whole point. To learn. To grow.

How would you like to join me on my adventures?

🦊  Series 1  ·  Book 2

Little Fox Thinks It Through

Little Fox has an idea he feels sure about. But along the way, he discovers that others see things differently. What happens when we slow down long enough to listen, explain, and stay? A gentle story about thoughtfulness, perspective, and finding understanding together.

Hi, I'm Little Fox.

Nice to meet you. I don't always get things right, but I think that's the whole point. To learn. To grow.

How would you like to join me on my adventures?

Little Fox Thinks It Through

A peek inside the book

Every page is illustrated by hand. Every story moves slowly on purpose.

Fox sets off He had an idea. It felt clear. It felt right.
Rabbit has doubts “I think I’d feel unsure about that.”
Deer sees it differently “I imagine something different,” Deer replied.
A quiet irritation Why did everyone see it differently when it felt so obvious to him?

🌿No villains. No winners. No lectures.

Little Fox Books

Pick your Little Fox

Books that build emotional literacy, shipped to your door.

Book 1

The Busy Day

Little Fox is having the kind of day where everything feels too much — too loud, too fast,…Little Fox is having the kind of day where everything feels too much — too loud, too fast, too full. But somewhere between the rushing and the doing, he finds a quiet moment. A gentle story about feelings, focus, and the power of simply stopping to breathe.

Book 2

Thinks It Through

Little Fox has an idea he feels sure about. But along the way, he discovers that others se…Little Fox has an idea he feels sure about. But along the way, he discovers that others see things differently. What happens when we slow down long enough to listen, explain, and stay? A gentle story about thoughtfulness, perspective, and finding understanding together.

Book 3

The Beach Day

A sunny day, a stretch of sand, and one little fox discovering the world one wave at a time…A sunny day, a stretch of sand, and one little fox discovering the world one wave at a time. Full of wonder, a little mess, and the kind of joy that only comes when you stop worrying about getting wet. A warm story about courage, curiosity, and letting go.

Book 4

Every Month

The Wild Challenge

Each Club box comes with a nature challenge card. Every month we celebrate the family whose entry made us feel something.

This month
The Okafor family

"They picked up litter on every walk for a week. Then Elias wrote: the forest felt happier after. That was enough."

🌿 Won a bonus character card
Last month
Chloe, age 8

"She sat on a log for ten minutes and wrote down what she noticed. The trees were breathing, she said. We didn't expect that."

🌿 Won a bonus character card
Join to enter this month's challenge

We never publish children's faces. Challenge entries are shared only in our private subscriber community with consent. Their actions speak for themselves.

For Educators & Communities

Little Fox in the real world

From classrooms to community groups, Little Fox travels well. Every setting gets more than just a book.

Read the story together, then let the conversation go where it needs to. Works as PSHE, circle time, or morning calm.

In the classroom

Plug-and-play PSHE — no prep required

Read the story together, then let the conversation go where it needs to. Works as a standalone PSHE lesson, circle time, morning calm, or part of an English unit.

Fits inside a single 45 to 60 minute lesson
Works alongside PSHE, English, or as morning calm
Discussion questions that hold space for every answer
No specialist training. Any teacher can run it.

The Wild Day Out

Read together, then go outside

A complete half-day experience for libraries, parent groups, or school trips. The story opens the conversation. The outdoors continues it.

Read the book together as a group
Head outside for the Wild Challenge
Circle-time reflection using the activity sheet
Children write or draw their own Wild story to finish
Build your package ↓
Wild Challenge

Take it outside

Every session comes with a Wild Challenge card, a nature task tied to that month's story. Take the class out. Everyone faces the same thing. Every feeling comes back different.

Wild Challenge card included with every booking
Works on school grounds, a local park, or anywhere outdoors
No equipment needed. Just space and attention.
Children share and compare. That's where the learning happens.

Good Questions

Everything you need to know

The books are written for children aged 3 to 8, but they're designed to be read together. The illustrations work for younger children; the themes work for older ones. Many parents tell us they read them again and again because the stories hold something different each time.

Every month we send a new Little Fox book plus eight things: a reflection sheet, a Wild Challenge card, a collectible character card, narrated audio tracks, a sticker sheet, a parent reading guide, a wild postcard, and one more surprise. Your box ships at the start of each month.

Yes, cancel any time. No questions asked. If you cancel before the 1st of the month your next box won't be sent. There are no penalties, no minimum commitment, and no complicated forms.

For the Monthly Club, we choose the book. That's part of what makes it feel like a real discovery each month. For a single book purchase, you pick the title from our current collection.

Single books and Gift Boxes are dispatched within 1 to 2 working days and arrive in 3 to 5 working days across the UK. Club boxes ship at the start of each month. We use Royal Mail and tracked couriers for all orders.

Currently we ship within the UK only. International shipping is on the way. If you'd like to register interest for your country, drop us a line at hello@thewildlearningcollective.com.

Most children's books rush to the lesson. Little Fox doesn't. The stories sit with feelings before offering answers. There are no villains, no winners, no tidy morals. Each book ends with a question or an image, because the meaning belongs to the child reading it, not to us.

No. The Gift Box is a one-off purchase that includes 3 complete monthly boxes, beautifully packaged with a personalised gift card. It simply stops after 3 months, with no automatic renewal and no unexpected charges.

Still have a question?

hello@thewildlearningcollective.com
🌱

Slow, not simplified

We don't rush to the lesson. Each story sits with the feeling first. Children need time to understand before they need answers.

🦊

No moral stated

Little Fox never tells you what to think. The story ends with an image, a silence, a question. The meaning belongs to the child.

🌿

A depth ladder

Books 1 to 5 explore single themes. Books 6 to 10 hold two at once. Books 11 onwards sit with conflict, nuance and true complexity.

📖

A 100-book universe

Five series, a locked art canon, a consistent world. Little Fox grows across every book, and so does the child reading alongside him.

“What happens when we slow down long enough to listen, explain, and stay?”
